name: binance-tokenized-securities-info
tagline: Queries Binance/Ondo tokenized US stock data via six public REST endpoints: price, holders, market status, corporate actions, K-Line.
verdict: Solid, well-scoped API reference with exact URLs, params, and worked curl/response examples for every endpoint; no auth, no destructive actions, no manipulation attempts. Main weakness: zero guidance on handling API errors, non-000000 codes, or unknown tickers across six external calls, and the whole 614-line catalog sits inline with no per-API reference.

highlights.summary: Six external API calls documented in full but no mention anywhere of error codes, timeouts, or ticker-not-found handling.
614-line catalog of 6 independent APIs kept fully inline; per-API reference files would load contextually cheaper.
Frontmatter description runs well over 1000 chars of bulleted use cases, past the terse-description guidance.
